EventDescriptions.EventDescription: System service "{object.name}" is enabled on host "{event_src.host}"
System service "{object.name}" is restarted on host "{event_src.host}"
System service "{object.name}" is started on host "{event_src.host}"
System service "{object.name}" is stopped on host "{event_src.host}"
System service "{object.name}" is disabled on host "{event_src.host}"
